M1308 Number of Pressure Ulcers- Stage IV This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage IV (enter 0 if none). CHAR 2 x x x
M1308_NBR_STG4_AT_SOC_ROC M1308 Number of Pressure Ulcers- Stage IV At SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage IV that were present on admission
(most recent SOC / ROC). CHAR 2 x
M1308_NSTG_DRSG M1308 Number of Unstageable Pressure Ulcers Due To Non-Rmvble Dsg This field indicates the current number
